entries.source:
Chat Edit: '**Acknowledged** — Six-module architecture locked. Here are the critical ABI specs to avoid linkage failures:

**x64 C ABI Naming (MASM):**
```asm
; In x64, C exports do NOT have leading underscore (unlike x86)
; Use this macro pattern in each file:
PUBLIC Genesis_VulkanCompute_Init      ; C++ sees: extern "C" void* Genesis_VulkanCompute_Init()
PUBLIC Genesis_ExtensionHost_Create    ; C++ sees: extern "C" bool Genesis_ExtensionHost_Create(HWND)
; etc.
```

**CMake Wiring Pattern:**
```cmake
# Add to existing Genesis build target (don't fragment):
set(GENESIS_MASM_SOURCES
    src/asm/genesis_masm64.asm
    src/asm/GenesisP0_VulkanCompute.asm
    src/asm/GenesisP0_ExtensionHost.asm
    src/asm/GenesisP0_WhiteScreenGuard.asm
    src/asm/GenesisP0_SelfHosting.asm
    src/asm/GenesisP0_AiBackendBridge.asm
    src/asm/GenesisP0_BuildOrchestrator.asm
)

# Single command builds all .asm -> .obj, then links:
add_custom_command(
    OUTPUT ${GENESIS_OBJS}
    COMMAND ${ML64} /c /Zi /Fo${CMAKE_CFG_INTDIR}/ ${GENESIS_MASM_SOURCES}
    DEPENDS ${GENESIS_MASM_SOURCES}
    COMMENT "Compiling Genesis MASM64 Modules (6x)"
)
```

**C++ Integration Headers (create `src/asm/genesis_exports.h`):**
```cpp
#pragma once
extern "C" {
    __declspec(dllimport) void* Genesis_VulkanCompute_Init(void* vkInstance);
    __declspec(dllimport) bool Genesis_ExtensionHost_Create(HWND parent);
    __declspec(dllimport) void Genesis_WhiteScreenGuard_Patch(HDC hdc);
    __declspec(dllimport) int Genesis_SelfHosting_Build(const char* target);
    __declspec(dllimport) void Genesis_AiBackendBridge_Connect(const char* endpoint);
    __declspec(dllimport) bool Genesis_BuildOrchestrator_Run(const char* args);
}
```

**Build Verification Command:**
```powershell
cd D:\rawrxd; cmake --build build --target RawrXD-GenesisBuild --config Release; $g=Test-Path build/tools/genesis_masm64.exe; $i=Test-Path build/Release/RawrXD-Win32IDE.exe; dumpbin /exports build/tools/genesis_masm64.exe | Select-String "Genesis_"; Write-Host "STATUS: Genesis=$g IDE=$i" -ForegroundColor $(if($g -and $i){"Green"}else{"Red"})
```

**P0 Priority Order (if time-constrained):**
1. `GenesisP0_WhiteScreenGuard.asm` (unblocks UI immediately)
2. `GenesisP0_VulkanCompute.asm` (enables AI inference)
3. `GenesisP0_ExtensionHost.asm` (replaces Cursor runtime)

Proceed with file creation — I’ll verify symbol exports once you confirm the .asm files are written.'
